message: Fix PickupBlock ARM_TOL too-early transition; use small darm=0.02 for arm extension in both behaviors
Remove PlaceBlock RETRACT phase; navigate with arm extended to avoid dropping block; plan nav in reset()
Fix NAVIGATE fallthrough bug: use while loop to skip close waypoints, return VAC_ON during navigation
PlaceBlock: tight position/theta tolerances in ORIENT; servo x,y during EXTEND to keep block centered in shelf slot
PlaceBlock ORIENT/EXTEND: dynamically correct robot x to account for block-arm offset so block fits in shelf slot
PlaceBlock: clamp adj_x to world bounds in ORIENT; no x movement during EXTEND arm; fix nav target_x clamping
Fix PickupBlock false termination + nav stuck + PlaceBlock skip when nothing held + arm stuck detect
Fix block drop: no rotation during PlaceBlock NAVIGATE; fix ORIENT adj_x bounds and block-dropped detection
Prefer approach from below (theta=pi/2) for stable grip; retry logic in approach.py
Add block0 shelf-removal strategy: PickupBlock allow_shelf, DropBlock, push-stacking in PlaceBlock
Fix DropBlock: retract arm then exit shelf vertically before lateral movement
Fix DropBlock: add phase4 move-away after releasing block0; fix drop location to avoid robot-block collision
Retract arm while navigating in PickupBlock to prevent arm-sweep collision during retries
